findings.title: AD and SYSVOL version mismatch
findings.description: The sample GPO has inconsistent AD and SYSVOL version evidence.
findings.technical_details: Computer version values differ in the fictional sample inventory.
findings.business_impact: Version mismatch can indicate policy replication or consistency issues.
findings.recommendation: Investigate replication health and confirm policy consistency.

findings.title: Stale GPO requires owner review
findings.description: The sample GPO has not been modified for more than 365 days.
findings.technical_details: Last modified age is 820 days in the fictional sample.
findings.business_impact: Stale policies can hide outdated settings and increase troubleshooting effort.
findings.recommendation: Confirm owner, export the GPO, test removal, and retire only after approval.
